description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a gray gable roof and white exterior walls, surrounded by a landscaped yard featuring several mature trees and shrubs. The front facade includes a covered porch supported by columns, a central entry door, and symmetrically arranged windows. A driveway leads to a garage on the right side of the house, with a car parked in front. The rear and side yards are bordered by greenery, including flowering bushes and additional trees, providing privacy and aesthetic appeal. The roof features multiple slopes and dormers, adding architectural interest. The overall design is reminiscent of a modern American Craftsman or Colonial Revival style, blending traditional and contemporary elements.
description: A two-story white house with a gray gable roof, covered porch, and landscaped yard with trees and shrubs. Features include a driveway, garage, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, central entry, driveway, garage, and main landscaping.
description_view_1: Right-side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and side yard with trees and flowering bushes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard landscaping, trees, and the back facade of the house.
description_view_3: Left-side view showing additional trees, shrubs, and the side elevation of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with covered porch, columns, and steps leading to a decorative front door
